chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD CP No. D- 707 of 2020 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 14.07.2020 For orders on MA 3186/20 For orders on office objection For orders on MA 3187/20 For orders on MA 3188/20 For hearing of main case Mrs. Razia Ali Zaman, Advocate for Petitioner Mr. Allah Bachayo Soomro, Addl.A.G. 1. Urgency application is granted. 2. Deferred for the time being. 3. Exemption application is granted subject to all just legal exceptions. 4. The grievance of the Petitioner is that he has moved an application to Respondents 3 & 4 requesting for grant of separate outlet from Nasir Branch at RD 57 for the part command of watercourse 1L & 2L at district Tando Allahyar. The said application was received by Assistant Executive Officer Sub Division Nasir Branch Rohri Canal Tando Allahyar which is available at page 43 annexure ‘F’. According to learned counsel the said application has not yet been decided, hence she prays that Respondents 3 and 4 may be directed to decide the application of the petitioner as early as possible. Learned A.A.G. present in court in other matters waives notices and raised no objection to the above proposal. Accordingly, the instant Petition is disposed of with direction to Respondents 3 and 4 to decide the application of the Petitioner, if any, pending before them strictly in accordance with law within fifteen days. JUDGE JUDGE karar_hussain/PS*
